content: RFC 0044 hardens the local Striatum memory boundary. The primary tenant/corpus is `striatum/striatum`; cross-tenant and cross-corpus reads require explicit capability tokens. EG-000 verifies the boundary before any projection or retrieval surfaces are built on top of it.

RFC 0045 proposes Striatum Corpus Contract V2, defining the shape of bundles exported from Striatum into Engram for projection. The contract remains proposal-only until the AL-D001 RFC 0044 hardening evidence and the AL-D002 acceptance decision both land.
